name: Concrete Steps Calculator
seo_title: Concrete Steps Calculator ? Tread, Riser & Volume
seo_description: Building concrete stairs? Enter total rise, run and step width to get number of steps, tread dimensions, riser height and total concrete volume for the entire.
description: Free online concrete steps calculator. Enter total rise and total run to get instant results.
steps: Volume per step: 0.30 m × 0.18 m × 1.2 m = 0.065 m³
Add 10% waste for formwork: 0.65 m³ × 1.10 = 0.72 m³
mistakes: Making risers too tall — building codes typically limit to 18 cm maximum
Not sloping treads slightly (1–2%) for rainwater drainage
Forgetting to include top and bottom landings in the step count
result_context: Your {escalones} concrete steps require {volume} m³ of concrete, including waste allowance for formwork.
formula_display: Volume per step = tread × riser × width; Total = volume × steps × (1 + waste%)
example_label: 10 steps, 30 cm tread, 18 cm riser, 1.2 m wide
desc: Free online concrete steps calculator. Enter total rise and total run to get instant results.
